description_long: This is a spacious, single-story bungalow with a modern, open-plan layout and multiple interconnected rooms. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. A prominent feature is the expansive pool area with a wooden deck, surrounded by palm trees and outdoor seating. The exterior walls are finished in a light brick or stone texture, complemented by flat roofs and covered walkways. The property includes a driveway, a garage, and several green spaces, including a central courtyard. The overall design emphasizes comfort, leisure, and accessibility, making it ideal for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a pool deck, and open-plan living spaces, surrounded by greenery and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front entrance, driveway, and a central courtyard with palm trees, as well as the main living and bedroom areas.
description_view_1: This angle showcases the pool area with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and the garage entrance, emphasizing the leisure and utility spaces.
description_view_2: This side reveals the full extent of the pool deck, sun loungers, and the open glass facade, with palm trees accentuating the outdoor living area.
description_view_3: This perspective focuses on the rear and side of the bungalow, showing the garage, service areas, and additional green spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
